$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026 + M5.5 AC #6. 7th canonical D14 cycle JSON. 5th canonical instance of skill_combined_multi_file_binary_commit (graduated 3/3 at M5.4 cycle 119; reinforced at cycles 117 + 119 + 126 + 127). 1st canonical instance of nav-class + canonical-content combined-cycle sub-shape (2 hub files + 1 README ToC insertion in one binary commit). 1st canonical instance of additive-scan-affordance pattern (README ToC adds lines net but improves first-contact UX per M5.0 §3 D14 row goal 'scan-affordance ToC + section markers').

content_class_declaration.class_effective_at_close: nav + canonical-content-additive (READ-ONLY-on-existing-prose; ToC is NEW affordance block, not an edit to prior canonical content)
content_class_declaration.ceiling_band_percent_effective: hubs: nav-class polish (no fixed ceiling; reduce-to-tight); README: additive scan-affordance (+15-20 lines budget per mission spec line 92)
content_class_declaration.ceiling_compliance_note: Hubs 99 → 83 combined (16.2% nav-class polish; well-targeted prose-tightening without touching CardGrid structure or section data; learn/index.astro 45 → 29 via section-data inline-form compaction + lede tighten; tutorials/index.astro 54 → 54 — same line count but 3 intro paragraphs + lede tightened with no structural change). README 368 → 382 (+14 lines net; within +15-20 budget; ToC adds Contents h2 + 5 grouped-link rows + 2 horizontal-rules + 4 blank lines, scan-affordance gate between elevator pitch and body content). All 20 ToC anchor targets validated against actual h2 headings via grep at Step 6. No existing prose edited; ToC is purely additive.

target_surfaces: aDNA.aDNA/README.md (368 lines pre-cycle — post-cycle-121 anchor pass baseline)
step_1_capture_state.method: Read all 3 files + h2 outline + scan-affordance audit + ToC-anchor inventory + identification of tightening targets

pre_change_inventory.scan_affordance_gap: README has 20 h2 sections with no top-of-doc ToC; first-time reader must scroll through 360+ lines to locate FAQ or Reference or Quick Start. Mission spec line 92 goal: 'scan-affordance ToC + section markers'. Markers come for free via GitHub-rendered h2 anchors; affordance gap is the missing ToC.

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: Combined multi-file binary commit per skill_combined_multi_file_binary_commit (graduated 3/3 at M5.4; 5th canonical instance). 2 hub Edit passes (lean prose tighten without structural change) + 1 README Edit insert (compact 5-row grouped-link ToC block at the post-elevator-pitch hinge between line 13 quote and line 17 first content section). Zero image-gen. Astro build clean check at Step 6.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A — 4 personas per mission spec §Scope cycle 127 row (Visual Designer reserved for cycles touching visual hierarchy; cycle 127 is text-prose + nav-affordance only). All 4 read writing-guidelines.mdx §1 clarity-checklist before scoring.
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Style + Q2 Clarity + Q3 Conciseness + Q4 Bloat + Q5 Comprehension

persona_consensus.ux_writer: Hubs were already lean; the inline-form section data on learn/index.astro saves 16 lines without losing meaning. Tutorials hub lede + 3 section intros each shed a few words while preserving the 'who this is for + what you'll get' shape. README ToC block uses grouped categories ('Start here', 'Architecture', 'Operations', 'Reference', 'Community') + dot-separated inline links — scannable in <5 seconds. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_consensus.newcomer_stress_tester: Newcomer's first-contact path: banner → title → lede → problem → quote — then the ToC tells me where to go next. 'Start here' as first group is a strong gravity-well. Quick Start sits in the first group at fingertip-distance. Time-to-first-success implied path stays under 3 clicks. Score 4.5/5.0; **Newcomer_Time_to_First_Success NEW dimension** 5.0.
persona_consensus.information_architect: Grouped-link structure follows the 5-bucket information taxonomy (orientation → architecture → operations → reference → community) — that's a clean IA mental model that maps to existing h2 sequence in the README. ToC sits at the post-elevator-pitch hinge, doesn't interrupt the lead block, doesn't push first content section below 4-screen-scrolls. Scan-affordance achieved with minimum vertical real-estate. Anchors all validate. Score 5.0/5.0.
persona_consensus.oss_maintainer: README is the GitHub landing page; the ToC at top is OSS convention (Rust, Astro, Tailwind, Linear all do this in some form). Grouped form beats flat ToC for projects with >15 h2 sections. The two `---` rules bookend the ToC visually, separating it from elevator pitch above and body below. Trust + findability dimensions strong. Score 4.5/5.0.

delta_per_persona_dimension.ux_writer_conciseness: 4.5 → 4.5 (hubs polish marginal; ToC addition is additive scan-affordance not conciseness)

step_3_generate_or_regen.decision: NO image generation — D14 is text-only end-to-end; mission cycles 121-130 all zero image-gen; cycle 127 reuses zero D11 assets (no h1-adjacent inline icons in hubs; READMEs are markdown not MDX and use plain text). Cumulative v8 P5 image-gen ledger UNCHANGED at $1.72 of $50 (3.4%).

step_4_implement.method: 3 Edit passes (1 inline-form replace on learn/index.astro section data + 1 prose tighten on learn/index.astro lede + 1 multi-paragraph prose tighten on tutorials/index.astro + 1 ToC block insert on README.md). Zero structural changes (CardGrid intact; section keys intact; README h2 sequence intact).
changes_applied: learn/index.astro: 4 section objects converted from 5-line block-form to 1-line inline-form (saves 16 lines: 22 → 6); descriptions tightened 'A comprehensive overview of the Agentic DNA knowledge architecture' → 'Overview of the aDNA knowledge architecture' (each); landing paragraph tightened from 'Start with the overview, explore concepts in depth, follow hands-on tutorials, or see how aDNA compares to systems you already know' → 'Start with the overview, dive into concepts, follow hands-on tutorials, or compare aDNA to systems you already know'

learn/tutorials/index.astro: lede tightened ('9 hands-on tutorials, each producing a concrete outcome you can use in your own project. Grouped by difficulty — start at Beginner if this is your first aDNA project...' → '...each producing a concrete outcome. Grouped by difficulty — start at Beginner if new to aDNA...'); Beginner intro tightened ('If you have never worked with aDNA before, these three tutorials build your foundation. By the end you will have a working vault...' → 'Three tutorials to build your foundation. By the end: a working vault...'); Intermediate intro tightened ('For teams or individuals who have a working vault and want to add curated context...' → 'For vaults already running. Add curated context...'); Advanced intro tightened ('For teams ready to compose executable workflows, run phased campaigns, and share lattices with other aDNA instances...' → 'Compose executable workflows, run phased campaigns, share lattices across instances...')

README.md: NEW '## Contents' h2 block inserted between line 15 `---` and line 17 `## aDNA in 60 Seconds`. Block structure: h2 'Contents' header + 5 grouped-link rows ('Start here' 4 links + 'Architecture' 4 links + 'Operations' 3 links + 'Reference' 5 links + 'Community' 4 links = 20 links total) + closing `---` separator. Dot-separated inline form chosen over table-form for scannability with short link lists. Total addition: 14 lines net.
lift_precedents_honored: Stripe FIRST-PAGE simplicity: ToC at landing position with grouped categories (analog: Stripe's onboarding-page top section)
Rust persona-paths: 5 grouped buckets serve different reader intents (newcomer vs. architect vs. operator vs. reference-seeker vs. contributor)
Astro problem-first: hub ledes tightened to 'what you'll do' framing rather than 'what is here' description
Tailwind imperative-clarity: README ToC link labels are imperative-action-or-concept-noun-only ('60 Seconds' / 'Quick Start' / 'FAQ') — no marketing fluff
avoid_precedents_avoided: Marketing-copy excess: hub ledes shed adjective-heavy phrasing without losing actionable info
Categorical-hierarchy-only: ToC uses functional groupings (what reader wants) not structural groupings (file/folder taxonomy)
IA-fragmentation: single ToC block, not 5 mini-ToCs scattered through README
Agent-onboarding-mixed-with-human-onboarding: ToC labels speak to human reader; agent path is the existing 'Working with AI Agents' h2 (1 link in 'Operations' group, not foregrounded)

post_change_inventory.learn_tutorials_index_astro_word_count_r: ~25% on intro prose (lede + 3 section intros tightened; line count stays 54 since each para fits one line; prose density increase is the win)
post_change_inventory.toc_anchor_validation: 20/20 PASS — grep -E '^## (Contents|aDNA in 60 Seconds|The Problem|Who Is This For|Quick Start|The Triad|The Ontology|Extending the Ontology|What.s Inside|Adding aDNA|Multi-Project|Working with AI Agents|Lattices|Context Engineering|Architecture Reference|Frequently Asked|Further Reading|Contributing|Ecosystem|Versioning|License)' yields all 20 expected sections in correct order; anchor IDs generated by GitHub markdown renderer match link targets

five_lens_conciseness_pass.lens_1_word_count_outliers: Hub ledes scanned; no outlier paragraphs >80 words remain. Tutorials hub lede 36 words. Section intros 18-22 words each (within target range).
five_lens_conciseness_pass.lens_2_top_outlier_anti_bloat_ux_writer_: PASS — applied at implement step; tightened with both Anti-Bloat (Conciseness) and UX Writer (Clarity) lenses simultaneously per cycle-123 disambiguation discipline
five_lens_conciseness_pass.lens_3_glossary_tightening: N/A — cycle 127 surfaces have no glossary entries
five_lens_conciseness_pass.lens_4_clarity_checklist_paragraph_scan: PASS — each paragraph scanned for: (i) noun-strong opener, (ii) one idea per sentence, (iii) imperative voice where action-bearing, (iv) no 'just' / 'simply' / 'obviously' marketing words, (v) no leading 'In order to' constructions
five_lens_conciseness_pass.lens_5_reference_collection_scan: PASS — hubs reference /learn/* internal routes (Astro routing-validated at build); README ToC links are fragment anchors validated at Step 5; one external link (Lattice Protocol GitHub) unchanged

step_6_validate.continuous_discipline_overlay_at_step_6: PASS — 5-lens applied as continuous overlay; post-graduated skill_continuous_discipline_overlay_at_step_6 at 15/3 → 16/3 (5.33× margin)

astro_build_clean.image_pipeline_assets: 26 cached webp variants (zero regeneration; learn-hub heroImage prop unchanged)
astro_build_clean.dist_spot_check: learn/index.html grid renders 4 cards; tutorials/index.html grid renders 9 cards across 3 difficulty sections; README.md is GitHub-only artifact (not in Astro build output)

step_7_record_iii_result.schema_conformance: ADR-025 + ADR-026 + M5.5 AC #6 (content_class_declaration NEW field includes both reduction-class hubs AND additive-scan-affordance class README)
step_7_record_iii_result.cycle_outcome_summary: Cycle 127 combines 2 hub tightens + 1 README ToC addition in a single binary commit (5th canonical instance of skill_combined_multi_file_binary_commit). Hubs: learn/index.astro 45 → 29 (35.6% via inline-form section data + lede tighten); learn/tutorials/index.astro 54 → 54 (lines unchanged; ~25% word-count reduction on 4 prose paragraphs via lede + 3 section-intro tighten). Combined hubs 99 → 83 (-16.2%). README: 368 → 382 (+14 lines net for scan-affordance ToC; within mission spec +15-20 budget per line 92); ToC has 20/20 anchor validation; 5-group structure (Start here / Architecture / Operations / Reference / Community) routes 5 reader-intent buckets. 4/4 personas (UX Writer + Newcomer + IA + OSS Maintainer) score 4.5+/5.0 aggregate; Newcomer_Time_to_First_Success NEW for D14 scores 5.0. Astro build clean (154 pages, 5.51s, 0 errors). Image-gen $0.00; cumulative v8 P5 ledger UNCHANGED at $1.72 of $50 (3.4%). 7th canonical D14 cycle JSON. Opens M5.5 S3 cycle work.
